prompt_text:
### Demographics: 65-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Major Depressive Disorder
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 111.5 kg; Height 184.4 cm; BMI 32.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 125/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.1%; 9 months ago 8.7%; 6 months ago 8.2%; 3 months ago 7.7%; current 7.2%), FPG (12 months ago 238mg/dL; 9 months ago 224mg/dL; 6 months ago 204mg/dL; 3 months ago 191mg/dL; current 190mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 117.2kg; 9 months ago 115.1kg; 6 months ago 113.2kg; 3 months ago 108.1kg; current 111.5kg), Height (12 months ago 184.4cm; 9 months ago 184.4cm; 6 months ago 184.4cm; 3 months ago 184.4cm; current 184.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 32.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 129mmHg; current 125mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 86mmHg; 9 months ago 84mmHg; 6 months ago 84mmHg; 3 months ago 86mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 30U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 30U/L; 3 months ago 21U/L; current 25U/L), AST (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 20U/L; 3 months ago 24U/L; current 22U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 9.0mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 7.3mL/min/1.73m²; current 8mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 726mg/g; 9 months ago 909mg/g; 6 months ago 879mg/g; 3 months ago 645mg/g; current 723mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 94mg/dL; 9 months ago 100mg/dL; 6 months ago 99mg/dL; 3 months ago 95mg/dL; current 97mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 57mg/dL; 9 months ago 57mg/dL; 6 months ago 58mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 59mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 117mg/dL; 9 months ago 96mg/dL; 6 months ago 111mg/dL; 3 months ago 99mg/dL; current 105mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 9.5g/dL; current 9.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
